title: nelumbo lutea
intro: Nelumbo lutea, also known as American Lotus or Yellow Lotus, is a perennial aquatic plant native to North America, characterized by its beautiful yellow flowers and edible rhizomes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Nelumbo lutea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The rhizomes can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
